title: clausena dentata var. pubescens
intro: Clausena dentata var. pubescens, also known as the velvet leaf or velvet clyx, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family that is native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Clausena dentata var. pubescens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be consumed fresh or dried to utilize its medicinal properties.
